name: Quail in Wine-Herb Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat quail with a mixture of flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Place onion slices in the Crock-Pot.
3. Top the onion slices with quail.
4. Cover the quail with diced bacon.
5. Add remaining ingredients (mushrooms, bay leaf, thyme, beef broth, white wine) to the Crock-Pot.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours.
7. Remove quail to a heated platter and sprinkle with parsley.
8. Thicken sauce if desired, then spoon over quail.
Serves 6
